source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 以科技创新支撑和引领中国式现代化
topics.official_english: More military technologies targeted for civilian sector to boost economy
topics.why_hot: High-level policy direction emphasizing technology as driver of modernization, widely discussed.
topics.share_angle: Explain how China is leveraging tech innovation for economic and social progress.

topics.chinese_topic: 多地打破医保户籍限制
topics.official_english: Education, health fees among key concerns
topics.why_hot: Healthcare reform directly affects millions; removing residency restrictions is a major step.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the impact of removing hukou barriers on healthcare access.

topics.chinese_topic: 河南造出全球最大培育钻石
topics.why_hot: Technological breakthrough in lab-grown diamonds, showcasing industrial capability.
topics.share_angle: Explore the science and market implications of the world's largest lab-grown diamond.

topics.chinese_topic: 洪灾后 务必注意这9件事
topics.why_hot: Practical safety tips after floods, highly relevant to affected regions.
topics.share_angle: Provide a concise guide on post-flood health and safety measures.

topics.chinese_topic: 台风巴威云系足以覆盖四五个省份
topics.why_hot: Typhoon Bavi is a major weather event affecting multiple provinces.
topics.share_angle: Explain the scale and potential impact of Typhoon Bavi.

topics.chinese_topic: 条蛇“越狱”背后的广西蛇产业
topics.why_hot: Snake escape incident highlights the scale and regulation of snake farming in Guangxi.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the snake farming industry and its environmental/economic aspects.

topics.chinese_topic: 哈兰德全网征集中国旅行攻略
topics.why_hot: Football star Erling Haaland asking for China travel tips sparks cross-cultural interest.
topics.share_angle: Highlight China's tourism appeal through a celebrity lens.

topics.chinese_topic: 美特战分队现身台岛 新动向很危险
topics.official_english: Taiwan's New Party vows to help improve relations
topics.why_hot: Sensitive geopolitical issue regarding US military presence in Taiwan.
topics.share_angle: Explain the implications of US special forces in Taiwan for cross-strait relations.
